bird.name: Black-fronted dotterel
bird.summary: The black-fronted dotterel (Thinornis melanops) is a small plover in the family Charadriidae that is found throughout much of Australia and…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
locations.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州（Tasmania，發音：/tæzˈmeɪniə/；帕拉瓦卡尼語：Lutruwita），簡稱塔州，是澳大利亞唯一的島嶼州，原名范迪門地（Van Diemen's Land，又譯萬迪門蘭）。該州位於澳大利亞大陸東南方約240公里…

locations.name: Wairau River
locations.summary: The Wairau River is one of the longest rivers in New Zealand's South Island.

locations.name: Awatere River
locations.summary: The Awatere River is a large river flowing through Marlborough, New Zealand.

relations.subject: Black-fronted dotterel
relations.evidence: The black-fronted dotterel is native to mainland Australia and Tasmania

relations.subject: Black-fronted dotterel
relations.evidence: The black-fronted dotterel is native to mainland Australia and Tasmania

relations.subject: Black-fronted dotterel
relations.evidence: |url=https://www.birdsnz.org.nz/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Notornis_18_2.pdf |journal=Notornis |volume=18 |page=133 |via=Birds New Zealand.}} As of 2016, the black-fronted dotterel officially inhabits most of New Zealand, with some of their key breeding spots being the Wairau and the Awatere rivers
